accurate.why: All claims match the bill text including quantities, dates, agency roles, and definitions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; all details traceable to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as banning importation of Russian-origin low-enriched uranium.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the bill amends Section 3112A of the USEC Privatization Act with conforming amendments described.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes DOE for national security/nonproliferation and non-uranium isotopes exceptions, plus waiver conditions.

effective_dates.why: States 90-day effective date, waiver termination by Jan 1 2028, and prohibition sunset Dec 31 2040.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers ban, anti-circumvention, waiver authority, quantity caps, congressional notification, and sunset.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and factual throughout with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized with logical flow from ban to exceptions to sunset.

concise.why: Thorough but not padded; all content substantive.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Secretary of Energy, State, Commerce, and the USEC Privatization Act.

correct_figures.why: All kilogram quantities and dates accurately reproduced from bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
